title: Meeting Joel - New Beginning
description: Met future husband Joel after escaping toxic relationship with Ron Castellanos. Joel became 'third and final guardian angel' - source of profound love, support, stability.

title: Marriage to Joel
description: Married Joel. Major positive turning point providing foundation for future growth. Joint achievements: purchased first home, started business, completed education.

title: Joel's I-601a Waiver Application
description: Authored detailed hardship letter supporting Joel's application to remain in U.S. Documented physical danger for openly gay couple in San Pedro Sula, Honduras, reliance on Joel's support for ill mother with COPD/PTSD who had been attacked and stabbed while working as taxi driver, personal debt over $60,000.

title: Luis - First Traffic Offenses
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis cited for operating vehicle without ever receiving license + drug possession. Convicted March 19, 2018. License suspended for failure to provide proof of insurance.

title: Luis - OWI and Related Charges
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Operating While Intoxicated Endangering Person, no license, possession of paraphernalia. Convicted May 5, 2018 (2 days after incident). License suspended for OWI Endangerment and Chemical Test Failure.

title: Luis - Compounding BMV Suspensions Begin
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: License suspended for Excessive Points (June 29), Repeat Insurance Violation (Aug 28), Failure to Appear for Driver Safety Program (Aug 28 - INDEFINITE expiration).

title: Luis - Unsatisfied Judgment Suspension
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: License suspended for 'Unsatisfied Judgment for Accident' with expiration date August 8, 2025 (nearly 7-year suspension).

title: Luis - Felony Residential Entry
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Felony 6 - Residential Entry (Break And Enter Dwelling). First documented felony-level offense. Decided June 3, 2019.

title: Luis - Felony Escape
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Felony 6 - Escape (knowingly/intentionally violated home detention order). Violated terms of prior sentence/conviction. Decided August 1, 2019.

title: Zaitullah Begins Work with U.S. Forces
description: Afghan roommate Zaitullah starts work with Khost Protection Force (KPF) at Camp Chapman. Role: BCP Escort / Overwatch personnel. Duties: Gate security, escorting American personnel, area overwatch, advance scouting.

title: Zaitullah - Combat Exposure
description: While on overwatch mission, bullet passed near Zaitullah's head with sharp whistling sound. Remained motionless to avoid detection; traumatic near-death experience.

title: Zaitullah - Loss of Colleague
description: During 3-day foot observation mission near 'Mi'kma'in,' teammate 'Mangal' shot and killed. Witnessed colleague's death; ongoing trauma.

title: Fall of Kabul
description: Kabul falls; commander orders 'no fire'. Night of August 15: Zaitullah spends one night at home with family before fleeing.

title: Zaitullah - Kabul Airport Evacuation Begins
description: Travels to Kabul Airport. Waits approximately one week at airport in chaotic conditions: slept on floors, minimal food, heard explosions.

title: Zaitullah - Evacuation Flight
location: Qatar → Germany → Washington D.C. → Fort McCoy, WI
description: Evacuated via Qatar → Germany → Washington D.C. → Fort McCoy, Wisconsin. Entered United States August 31, 2021 with OAW (Operation Allies Welcome) parole status.

title: Zaitullah Arrives Indianapolis - Became Primary Support
description: Zaitullah arrived Indianapolis with severe trauma, no family, limited English. You became his primary support system for English learning, immigration paperwork, basic needs.

title: Taliban Threats Begin
description: Taliban actively searching for Zaitullah by name in Afghanistan. Family reports being questioned; called a 'servant of the kafirs'. Ongoing fear; family in danger; need for asylum case.

title: Promissory Notes & Mortgages Established
description: Two promissory notes and mortgages secured by real estate in Marion County, Indiana. One note for $23,000. Created significant long-term liability that later became basis for foreclosure lawsuit. Entanglements with American Express and J.P. Morgan Chase. Primary residence at direct risk of loss.

title: Early Warnings of Business Collapse
description: Period documented as containing early warnings of impending collapse. Underlying financial and partnership issues beginning to surface. Precursor to severe crises of 2023.

title: Systemic Business Collapse
description: Revenue freefall over 18 months: Initial Annual Revenue nearly $2,000,000 → Final Annual Revenue less than $100,000. Low-margin business structure couldn't reduce expenses fast enough. Impossible to service accumulated debt and fees; complete business failure inevitable.

title: IISITAX Joint Venture - Complete Betrayal
description: Five-phase breakdown: False Promises, Exploitation, Hostile Takeover, Smear Campaign, Total Collapse. Your Contribution: $8,493.66 in capital + 683 documented hours. Arleth's Contribution: $1,577 received with ZERO documented contributions. Arleth's Theft: $800 stolen from client. You: 'The only person who actually built anything of value' but 'Financially exploited, Gaslit and scapegoated... Left with the debt, the blame, and no way forward.' Business collapse triggered loss of health insurance.

title: Severe Financial Ruin
description: Over $50,000 in unpaid invoices. Over $100,000 in uncompensated labor. Over $11,000 lost to check fraud. Verizon unlawfully froze business funds. Legal judgments: Chase ($3,664.43 + $25,882.44), Citi ($9,002.49), American Express ($23,384.30), Capital One ($7,927.44). Total Debt: Over $500,000. Destroyed all income streams, multiple legal judgments, forced into bankruptcy, unable to maintain critical assets (Tesla income vehicle).

title: Joel's Deportation
description: Husband Joel deported from United States after residing here 22 years. 'Broke your last internal structure.' Removed vital partner at precise moment business required two people to manage. Made total collapse inevitable; left you feeling powerless and alone.

title: Escalating Health Crisis
description: Suspected mini-stroke, extreme anxiety, debilitating fatigue, severe sensory overload, intensification of ADHD symptoms. 'Mentally paralyzed' and unable to function. Complete cognitive shutdown. Loss of health insurance following business collapse forced you off necessary medication.

title: Loss of Assets and Housing Instability
description: Assets Lost: Tesla vehicle (used for rideshare/delivery income) - TOTALED, Lafayette business office - SHUT DOWN, all savings, home (foreclosure threat), all vehicles. Abusive Roommate Crisis: blackmail, threats, leaked private content, police called multiple times. Systematically eliminated remaining income streams and safe spaces; displacement; deepening financial precarity; compounding trauma.

title: Compounded Grief
description: Personal losses during business collapse: traumatic death of beloved dog, rehoming of one cat (another ran away), death of two aunts, death of one cousin. Personal bereavements compounded professional/financial grief; overwhelming multifaceted sense of loss on all fronts.

title: Gender Transition Begins
description: Extreme stress triggered hormonal imbalances and weight loss. Unexpected development of breasts. Realization: transgender female identity. 'Yet another layer of stress and uncertainty' to already overwhelmed state but essential journey toward authenticity. Promise of 'a future where I can finally be at peace with who I am.' Profound shift from externally defined roles to internal, authentic identity.

title: Utility Crisis Begins
description: AES Indiana billing patterns become irregular. High electricity usage partially due to roommate's Tesla charging (not initially separated). Arrears start accumulating.

title: Business Partner Final Breakdown
description: Text from Arleth - landlord demands belongings removed by April 30th. Large printers and office items left in shared space. Unable to coordinate truck rental due to financial crisis. Communication breakdown; professional liability exposure continues. Client issues: ITIN Applications (CAA license 'no longer valid'), bookkeeping clients abandoned without proper handoff, tax filing issues (unfiled amendment).

title: Mental Health Crisis Deepens
description: Your statement: 'I've been helping Zai navigate his immigration process—something Crystal said she'd support but never followed through on. His health is declining. Joel's slipping back into paranoia and delusions. And my own mental state has hit rock bottom. I panic at every sound. I'm terrified to answer the phone, check emails, or open the door.'

title: Close Friend's Tragic Death
description: A former roommate and close friend who had been assisting with basic needs was tragically killed near residence. Compounded stress and instability; lost critical support system during already devastating period.

title: Luis - Onset of Escalating Abusive Behavior
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Shift in Luis's demeanor following an accident. Frequent sudden yelling and screaming, throwing objects across room (sometimes at you while asleep), physical violence: 'struck... in the face', 'vile insults', threats of harm for non-compliance. You: 'Prisoner in my own home'; living in constant fear.

title: Luis - Highway and Hotel Incident
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis pressured you to let him drive; had 'tantrum' on highway (screaming, banging on dashboard). At Motel 6: became hostile, refused to exit car, threatened you when you wouldn't drive him again. Threats: physical harm and vehicle vandalism. You: 'Utterly terrified'; 'brink of a panic attack'.

title: Luis - Daily Threats Against Joel
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Approximately one month of daily threats targeting husband Joel. Specific threat: 'Beat him down with his gang friends.' Persistent intimidation and fear within household.

title: Zaitullah Receives Threatening Contact
description: Taliban actively asking about Zaitullah by name in Afghanistan. You directly witnessed this call from his family. Increased stress and instability in household; heightened fear for roommate's safety.

title: Luis - Physical Altercation with Zaitullah
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Zaitullah attempted to de-escalate situation where Luis was yelling. Luis's response: attacked Zaitullah. Result: physical 'tussle'. Demonstrated willingness to engage in violence against others in home.

title: Luis - Attempted Home Invasion & Homicide Threats
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis stood outside home threatening to scale exterior and break in through master bedroom window if not allowed entry. Stated he would 'take another person with him before taking his own life.' Direct homicide threat against household. Served as direct catalyst for filing petition for order of protection.

title: Luis - Property Damage
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis spent several hours hurling objects at upstairs window using 'heavy metal item.' Destroyed window screen; cracked bathroom floor tile.

title: Ex Parte Order for Protection Issued
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Case 49D09-2411-PO-052230. Protected: Cody J Rice-Velasquez, Zaitullah Jan Khebarkhil, Joel Enhan Rice-Velasquez. Order: prohibits Luis from contacting protected parties, must stay away from residence/school/place of employment, 'Brady disqualified' (federal offense to possess firearm). Effective November 18, 2024 to November 18, 2026.

title: Business Dissolution Continues
description: Lost QHR client base (unable to keep up while focusing on IISITax). IISITax operations becoming unsustainable. Professional reputation damaged from Luis's sabotage campaign. Unable to recover from combined business and personal setbacks.

title: Utility Arrears Continue Growing
description: January-March 2025: Statements show growing balance. Continued irregular billing. Situation deteriorating.

title: AES Extension Crisis
description: AES Indiana creates payment extension. Balance temporarily drops. False sense of relief and breathing room. Reality: set up for trap.

title: EXTENSION CANCELED WITHOUT NOTICE
description: AES cancels previously approved extension without explanation or notification. Balance immediately jumps by approximately $5,225. This single action inflates debt far beyond actual electricity consumption. Predatory billing practice.

title: Office Eviction Pressure Intensifies
description: Text exchange with Arleth about removing belongings. Unable to coordinate truck rental for large equipment. Mental state: 'Panic at every sound, terrified to answer phone, check emails, or open the door.'

title: ADA Accommodation Request Submitted
description: Formal written request to AES Indiana for ADA accommodation. Included medical hardship documentation. NO RESPONSE RECEIVED.

title: Re-traumatization by Ex-Partner Ron Castellanos
description: In moment of extreme vulnerability, reached out to inform Ron of mother's hospitalization. Response: angry, impatient, deeply judgmental. Harmful statements: 'You need to get it together'; 'You let yourself go.' Blocked him to prevent further psychological harm and 'protect my peace and my energy.'

title: Payment Made to AES
description: Payment made to AES Indiana in attempt to catch up on arrears. Payment initially processed.

title: PAYMENT RETURNED + FEE
description: ACH payment reversed (likely insufficient funds due to cascading financial crisis). Additional $20 returned payment fee charged. Total swing: approximately $1,590 against account. Creates impossible catch-up scenario.

title: Utility Disconnection Period
description: Service disconnected despite pending ADA accommodation request and medical hardship documentation submitted. Multiple nights without heat or power during freezing temperatures. Shared home with service animal and Afghan veteran roommate. 'Endured several nights under blankets, unable to sleep or work.' Extreme cold aggravated medical conditions. Pain and suffering documented in affidavit.

title: Cascading Consequences of Disconnection
description: Loss of income: unable to work from home without power. Forced displacement expenses: hotel stays (father paid for some), storage unit rental. Hotel incident: removed from hotel after oversleeping past checkout during 'severe fatigue, pain, and sleep deprivation.' Late fees compounding monthly throughout period. 'Piling of late fees undermined my ability to catch up—especially after disconnection prevented me from working.'

title: Luis - Alleged Sexual Assault
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Incident of sexual assault allegedly occurred while you were unconscious. Your statement: consent was not possible. Location: bedroom at residence. Most severe personal allegation documented. VIOLATION OF PROTECTION ORDER.

title: Luis - Harassment During Client Visit
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: During professional client visit at residence, Luis engaged in non-stop calling and messaging. Threats to come to residence and attack both you and the client. Significant professional disruption and fear. VIOLATION OF PROTECTION ORDER.

title: Luis - Forcible Entry & Threats
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis broke down bedroom door with enough force to damage multiple locks and 1,300-lb security latch. Called 9-1-1 while hiding in bathroom. Luis reportedly had a weapon. Text during incident: 'where are you, bitch? I'm going to beat your ass. Come out.' Severe fear; disruption to basic personal care routines. VIOLATION OF PROTECTION ORDER.

title: Luis - Continued Harassment & Property Damage
involved: Luis Antonio Palacios De La Rosa
description: Luis returned after police left scene. Seen on roof, threw heavy objects at window. iPad began displaying 'lost/stolen' messages (suggesting remote tampering). Police called to residence a second time. Roommate witnessed this incident. VIOLATION OF PROTECTION ORDER.

title: Large Payment Finally Posts
description: Large payment posts to AES account. Account should be current. Reality: damage already done; ongoing crisis management needed.

title: COMPREHENSIVE RESPONSE PACKAGE CREATED
description: Seasonal Payment Plan finalized (36-month, ≤$600/month). ADA Accommodation Packet assembled. Affidavit of Hardship written & signed. Evidence collection: efficiency measures documented, Tesla charging separated, all 22 billing statements compiled, call logs & communication records. Regulatory complaint drafted for IURC. Billing audit completed: Usage-only cost ~$4,600-$4,700, Inflation from fees ~$3,000-$3,300, Security deposit $942, Claimed total before payment $8,857.21. Key finding: returned payment loop and extension cancellation drove debt more than actual consumption.
